name: rubric rule schema validator accepts an array-shape provenance entry per section 2.1
command: printf '{"id":"r","name":"r","description":"x","detector":"x","severity":"P1","semver":"1.0.0","provenance":[{"source":"x","class":"published-standard","section_id":"y","fetched_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","content_hash":"sha256:abc"}]}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json --check provenance 2>out.txt && grep -q 'provenance_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
